forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8980'
+project: semantic-search
+title: Code-aware tokenizer module for search fusion
+---
+## What
+Add a code-aware tokenizer that the BM25 and trigram signals of the fused `search code` will share. New module: `crates/swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_fusion/tokenize.rs` (create the `search_fusion` submodule dir; register `pub mod search_fusion;` inside `crates/swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_code.rs` OR add `pub mod search_fusion;` to `crates/swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` â€” pick the latter so the primitives are reusable and unit-testable independently of the op).
+
+Tokenization rules (agreed design â€” do NOT add Porter stemming; trigram carries fuzziness):
+- Lowercase everything.
+- Split on whitespace and punctuation (anything not `[A-Za-z0-9]`).
+- Additionally split identifiers on camelCase boundaries (`getUser` -> `get`, `user`) and snake_case boundaries (`get_user` -> `get`, `user`).
+- Digit runs split off as their own tokens at letter/digit transitions is optional â€” keep simple: treat `[A-Za-z0-9]+` runs then sub-split on camelCase. Document the exact rule chosen in the function docstring.
+
+Public API (pure, no DB):
+- `pub fn tokenize(text: &str) -> Vec<String>` â€” full pipeline above.
+- `pub fn char_trigrams(s: &str) -> Vec<[char; 3]>` (or `Vec<String>` of length-3 windows) over a lowercased string â€” used by the trigram-Dice signal. Document handling of strings shorter than 3 chars (return empty).
+
+This is foundational: BM25 (corpus df/avgdl + per-chunk tf) and trigram-Dice both consume `tokenize`. No DB access, no embedding access â€” pure string functions.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `tokenize("getUserById")` yields `["get", "user", "by", "id"]` (camelCase split, lowercased).
+- [ ] `tokenize("get_user_by_id")` yields `["get", "user", "by", "id"]` (snake_case split).
+- [ ] `tokenize("fn parse_config() -> Result")` splits punctuation and keywords into lowercase word tokens with no empty strings.
+- [ ] `char_trigrams("get_user")` returns the sliding length-3 windows of the lowercased string; strings shorter than 3 chars return an empty Vec.
+- [ ] Module is reachable from `search_code.rs` (it `use`s `super::search_fusion::tokenize`).
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Unit tests in `crates/swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_fusion/tokenize.rs` `#[cfg(test)] mod tests`: camelCase split, snake_case split, mixed `getHTTPResponse`-style runs, punctuation stripping, empty-string and sub-3-char trigram edge cases.
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-code-context tokenize` passes (all new tests green).
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to pass.
\ No newline at end of file
